artists.name: Parth
artists.note: Founder and director of Areeso Theatre — leading the company from its very first act.

artists.name: Meher Irani
artists.note: Trained in theatre from Mumbai; brings a decade of stage craft to every role.

artists.name: Sourav Das
artists.note: Composes live scores that blend folk traditions with contemporary sound.

artists.name: Priya Nair
artists.note: Paints every scene with light — from a single candle-glow to a full storm.

artists.name: The Ensemble
artists.note: The hands and hearts behind every curtain call.
